changelog.3.2.1: Fixed clock skew tolerance in JWT validation; improved token cache invalidation on key rotation
changelog.3.2.0: Added OAuth2 PKCE support; rate limit headers now included in all 429 responses
changelog.3.1.2: Patched token expiry miscalculation when token_lifetime < 300s
changelog.3.1.1: Security patch for scope validation bypass (CVE-2025-4471)

3.1.0: Token cache not invalidated on API key rotation — fixed in 3.2.1
Clock skew tolerance set to 0s — fixed in 3.2.1
3.1.2: Rate limit counter not reset after key rotation — fixed in 3.2.0

config_reference.cache_ttl: Token cache TTL defaults to token_lifetime. Clear via DELETE /v2/auth/tokens/cache

changelog.2.4.0: Added multipart upload support; improved CORS pre-flight caching
changelog.2.3.5: Fixed 403 on presigned URL expiry edge case
changelog.2.3.0: New bucket policy engine; deprecated legacy ACL system

2.3.0: Legacy ACL migration not automatic — manual step required after upgrade
CORS wildcard origin rejected in strict mode — use explicit origin list

config_reference.cors_origins: Set via PUT /v2/store/buckets/{id}/cors — array of allowed origins
config_reference.bucket_policy: JSON policy document. Set via PUT /v2/store/buckets/{id}/policy

active_incident.title: NexaMsg webhook delivery degraded — EU-WEST region
active_incident.impact: Webhook delivery delayed 15-45 minutes for events in EU-WEST region. Message queuing unaffected.
active_incident.workaround: Use webhook retry endpoint to manually trigger redelivery: POST /v2/msg/webhooks/{id}/retry

changelog.1.8.2: Improved webhook retry backoff; added delivery receipt events
changelog.1.8.0: New message filtering API; added per-topic rate limits
changelog.1.7.5: Fixed duplicate message delivery on network timeout

1.7.5: Webhook signature validation fails for payloads > 1MB — fixed in 1.8.0

config_reference.delivery_timeout: Default 30s per attempt. Configurable up to 120s

changelog.4.1.0: Added multi-currency reconciliation; improved idempotency key handling
changelog.4.0.5: Fixed duplicate charge on network timeout with idempotency keys
changelog.4.0.0: New payment routing engine; added support for SEPA and PIX

4.0.0: SEPA IBAN validation accepts invalid checksums — fixed in 4.0.5
Idempotency key TTL not respected when payment processor retries — fixed in 4.0.5

config_reference.idempotency_key: Required header: Idempotency-Key: {uuid}. TTL 24h. Reuse returns cached response.
config_reference.payment_methods: Configure via PUT /v2/pay/config/methods — array of enabled methods
